sentences.english: I overthink everything, especially at night.
sentences.korean: 모든 걸 과하게 생각해요, 특히 밤에요.

sentences.english: My brain just won't turn off.
I used to overthink a lot, but meditation really helped me stop.
sentences.korean: 예전에 많이 과하게 생각했지만 명상이 정말 도움이 됐어요.

sentences.english: Even ten minutes a day makes a difference.
Writing my thoughts in a journal before bed helps me clear my mind, so I can actually fall asleep.
sentences.korean: 자기 전에 일기장에 생각을 쓰면 머리가 맑아져서 실제로 잠들 수 있어요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
